filesystem.description: Filesystem access for all agents — reads existing components before generating, writes new files, explores project structure

memory.description: Persistent memory — stores React/TypeScript component patterns, naming conventions, and team decisions across sessions

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning — used by planner and architect agents before writing code

context7.description: Live documentation lookup — fetches up-to-date React, TypeScript, Vite, Next.js, and ecosystem library docs on demand

insaits.description: AI security monitoring — used by security-reviewer agent for anomaly detection, credential exposure, and OWASP MCP Top 10 coverage. Install: pip install insa-its

_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window — this config has 5 servers
_comments.filesystem_path: Change '.' to an absolute path if running Copilot from a different working directory
_comments.insaits_prereq: Run 'pip install insa-its' before enabling the insaits server
_comments.excluded: Vercel, Railway, Cloudflare, Supabase, ClickHouse excluded — backend/infra tools not relevant to this frontend plugin
